/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/skypod_swarm.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/skypod_swarm.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_basics/juce_audio_basics.mm.o CMakeFiles/skypod_swarm.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_core/juce_core_CompilationTime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/skypod_swarm.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_core/juce_core.mm.o CMakeFiles/skypod_swarm.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_dsp/juce_dsp.mm.o CMakeFiles/skypod_swarm.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_formats/juce_audio_formats.mm.o -o skypod_swarm  _deps/raylib-build/raylib/libraylib.a -framework IOKit -framework Cocoa -framework OpenGL -framework OpenGL -framework IOKit -framework Cocoa -framework CoreFoundation -framework Cocoa -framework Foundation -framework IOKit -framework Security -framework Accelerate -framework CoreAudio -framework CoreMIDI -framework QuartzCore -framework AudioToolbox
